applied_findings.action: Updated section 3 (tech selection table), section 4 heading source reference, section 10 decision table, and added future issue note. Changed 'FileViewer.tsx pattern complete adherence' to acknowledge FilePanelContent.tsx as the source of the useRef+useEffect cleanup pattern.
Corrected line number reference in section 4 heading from 'L270-279' to 'L271-279' (L270 is JSDoc comment line).

Updated section 5-1 import section to clarify that useRef/useEffect are already imported at L14, and only ClipboardCopy/Check and copyToClipboard need new imports. Updated implementation checklist accordingly.
Added comment annotation to section 4 UI pattern noting that existing FileViewer.tsx lacks type='button', and section 5 adds it as an improvement.

summary: Applied 4 findings (1 must_fix, 1 should_fix, 2 nice_to_have) to the design policy. CR2-004 (must_fix): corrected pattern attribution from 'FileViewer.tsx complete adherence' to 'FileViewer.tsx/FilePanelContent.tsx pattern with cleanup from FilePanelContent.tsx'. CR2-001 (should_fix): fixed line number L270-279 to L271-279. CR2-002: clarified existing imports. CR2-003: annotated type='button' improvement. Added Stage 2 review findings summary section (section 12), renumbered implementation checklist to section 13, and recorded FileViewer.tsx cleanup gap as a future issue. 3 findings skipped as they confirmed consistency with no action needed.
